HEARTHCRAFT
⌂ Home ◷ Time ⛏ Build ☺ People ▣ Shots ✦ End ? Info ! Meme

SEVEN YEARS. ONE WORLD.

From 1.12 in 2018 to nearly a terabyte of terrain — the server history, chunk by chunk.

  1. 2018

    The first hearth

    HearthCraft SMP launches on 1.12 — a small server with one idea: build a community people could call home.

  2. 2019

    The world that never resets

    The server finds its footing. After July, the world would never reset again — every path and build preserved.

  3. 2020–21

    Home through the pandemic

    When much of the world closed, HC stayed open. Tens of thousands of players logged in for warmth, banter, and belonging.

  4. 2022–24

    Seven years of building

    The community kept going. The world grew — terrain, bases, stories — until the files approached a terabyte.

  5. Apr 2025

    The last day

    On April 18, players gathered one final time. The server closed. The hearth went quiet.

    The last day →

HEARTHCRAFT SMP · 2018 – 2025

One world. Never reset.
